name: Eggman Nega and Metal Sonic 3.0
description:
COMBO MEAL!

TW: NONE!

UNTESTED!

REQUESTED!

The two find eachother after escaping the Chaotic Inferno. Eggman Nega starts scheming while the robot simply follows him, having only the purpose of following the orders of Nega.

Guys why are old people so picky and so hard to please? istg she be like 'use the hamburger meat' and i be like oka want me to make this? its really good and its easy to make. AND SHE IS ONG LOOKING AT ME LIKE IT IS GONNA TASTE LIKE SHIT BECAUSE ITS MY OWN RECIPE. God taking care of old folk is rough, they're so judgmental, and stuck in their ways. I also found out when i was on vacation that she had begged me to come out here to live with her. I thought my dad literally just sent me off just so i had to take care of her. But no they just wanted me to get a cheaper education and to find what makes me happy. Oh god i need to sign up for fasfa and then go check out the University campus before enrollment ends...

Oh also i dont actually put what abilities characters have in the bot descriptions... uhg thats so much work if i do... I should go fix up my TD bots.

All bots I make are Ged up, ty for requesting enjoy.

COMBO MEAL BOT LINKS REDIRECTORY
creator: Moje
